Package org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.tactics

Class LocalEqRewriteProvider.LocalEqRewriteAppliInspector

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.tactics.DefaultApplicationInspector
org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.tactics.LocalEqRewriteProvider.LocalEqRewriteAppliInspector
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFormulaInspector<ITacticApplication>
Enclosing class:
LocalEqRewriteProvider
public static class LocalEqRewriteProvider.LocalEqRewriteAppliInspector extends DefaultApplicationInspector
The inspector finding all the occurrences of identifiers appearing on one side of an equality, except the one of that equality.
